---
name: html-animation
description: Generates a self-contained interactive HTML animation for a math concept. Use when asked to create an animation, interactive visualization, or HTML demo for a math topic.
---

Generate a fully self-contained HTML file with all CSS and JavaScript inline. Do not use external libraries, CDN links, or external script files.

Requirements:
- Include at least one interactive control such as a slider or button
- Use canvas-based or SVG-based drawing
- Display key numerical values that update in real time
- Include a title and one-sentence description at the top
- Use a clean, readable academic layout
- Save the output as an `.html` file that opens directly in a browser

Concept and any specific requirements: {{input}}
